## Meeting Purpose

[Deep dive feedback session on GrowthX's services for Innerwell, addressing challenges and planning improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/JQPyJtiwsAsWuFGyuNZNDwmsRN8byCF9?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Innerwell experiencing significant issues with GrowthX's service, feeling like "working with a  agency with high turnover"](https://fathom.video/share/JQPyJtiwsAsWuFGyuNZNDwmsRN8byCF9?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
  - [GrowthX acknowledges shortcomings, commits to reset strategy with a dedicated "strategy sprint"](https://fathom.video/share/JQPyJtiwsAsWuFGyuNZNDwmsRN8byCF9?tab=summary&timestamp=511.0)
  - [Focus on shifting to more programmatic, automated approach with proper engineering allocation](https://fathom.video/share/JQPyJtiwsAsWuFGyuNZNDwmsRN8byCF9?tab=summary&timestamp=711.0)
  - [Emphasis on city-level SEO strategy, contrary to previous state-level focus](https://fathom.video/share/JQPyJtiwsAsWuFGyuNZNDwmsRN8byCF9?tab=summary&timestamp=1402.0)

## Topics

### Current State of Innerwell's Business

  - [Growing team and business](https://fathom.video/share/JQPyJtiwsAsWuFGyuNZNDwmsRN8byCF9?tab=summary&timestamp=235.0)
  - [Experimenting with growth channels, trying to grow SEO alongside paid](https://fathom.video/share/JQPyJtiwsAsWuFGyuNZNDwmsRN8byCF9?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)
  - [65% of paid traffic from Google, rest mostly from Meta](https://fathom.video/share/JQPyJtiwsAsWuFGyuNZNDwmsRN8byCF9?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)
  - [Lost \~50% of organic traffic since partnering with GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/JQPyJtiwsAsWuFGyuNZNDwmsRN8byCF9?tab=summary&timestamp=258.0)

### GrowthX Service Issues

  - [High employee turnover causing inconsistency](https://fathom.video/share/JQPyJtiwsAsWuFGyuNZNDwmsRN8byCF9?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)
  - [Lack of proactive strategy and opportunity identification](https://fathom.video/share/JQPyJtiwsAsWuFGyuNZNDwmsRN8byCF9?tab=summary&timestamp=469.0)
  - [Slow delivery on promised deliverables (e.g., first report just received)](https://fathom.video/share/JQPyJtiwsAsWuFGyuNZNDwmsRN8byCF9?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
  - [Link building progressing slower than expected](https://fathom.video/share/JQPyJtiwsAsWuFGyuNZNDwmsRN8byCF9?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)
  - [Feels more like traditional agency work than programmatic/software approach](https://fathom.video/share/JQPyJtiwsAsWuFGyuNZNDwmsRN8byCF9?tab=summary&timestamp=519.0)

### Strategy and Execution Concerns

  - [Strategy rated 5-6/10, solid but requires too much client input](https://fathom.video/share/JQPyJtiwsAsWuFGyuNZNDwmsRN8byCF9?tab=summary&timestamp=462.0)
  - [Lack of holistic opportunity assessment and prioritization](https://fathom.video/share/JQPyJtiwsAsWuFGyuNZNDwmsRN8byCF9?tab=summary&timestamp=486.0)
  - [Absence of clear plan to address traffic loss due to AI-generated answers](https://fathom.video/share/JQPyJtiwsAsWuFGyuNZNDwmsRN8byCF9?tab=summary&timestamp=635.0)
  - [Basic SEO hygiene issues (e.g., missing schema tags)](https://fathom.video/share/JQPyJtiwsAsWuFGyuNZNDwmsRN8byCF9?tab=summary&timestamp=406.0)

### GrowthX's Response and Plan

  - [Acknowledge issues stemming from rapid growth and new team formations](https://fathom.video/share/JQPyJtiwsAsWuFGyuNZNDwmsRN8byCF9?tab=summary&timestamp=85.0)
  - [Propose "strategy sprint" led by Marcel (CEO) to reset approach](https://fathom.video/share/JQPyJtiwsAsWuFGyuNZNDwmsRN8byCF9?tab=summary&timestamp=1502.0)
  - [Commit to more programmatic execution with proper engineering allocation](https://fathom.video/share/JQPyJtiwsAsWuFGyuNZNDwmsRN8byCF9?tab=summary&timestamp=1578.0)
  - [Plan to implement custom workflows and automate content creation/publishing](https://fathom.video/share/JQPyJtiwsAsWuFGyuNZNDwmsRN8byCF9?tab=summary&timestamp=1772.0)

### SEO Strategy Refinement

  - [Shift focus to city-level pages, recognizing higher search volumes](https://fathom.video/share/JQPyJtiwsAsWuFGyuNZNDwmsRN8byCF9?tab=summary&timestamp=1346.0)
  - [Analyze competitors like ZocDoc, Psychology Today, Talkspace for successful strategies](https://fathom.video/share/JQPyJtiwsAsWuFGyuNZNDwmsRN8byCF9?tab=summary&timestamp=1402.0)
  - [Commit to building out city-level landing pages programmatically](https://fathom.video/share/JQPyJtiwsAsWuFGyuNZNDwmsRN8byCF9?tab=summary&timestamp=1446.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule strategy sprint kick-off for June 23rd](https://fathom.video/share/JQPyJtiwsAsWuFGyuNZNDwmsRN8byCF9?tab=summary&timestamp=1521.0)
  - [GrowthX to begin internal recalibration next week](https://fathom.video/share/JQPyJtiwsAsWuFGyuNZNDwmsRN8byCF9?tab=summary&timestamp=1544.0)
  - [Implement more programmatic approach with custom workflows and automation](https://fathom.video/share/JQPyJtiwsAsWuFGyuNZNDwmsRN8byCF9?tab=summary&timestamp=1772.0)
  - [Develop and present refreshed strategy during the kick-off meeting](https://fathom.video/share/JQPyJtiwsAsWuFGyuNZNDwmsRN8byCF9?tab=summary&timestamp=1521.0)
  - [Allocate necessary engineering resources to Innerwell's account](https://fathom.video/share/JQPyJtiwsAsWuFGyuNZNDwmsRN8byCF9?tab=summary&timestamp=1793.0)
